document_metadata.title: CHURCH SCHEDULES
document_metadata.first_words: Assembly of God, Clarkfield SUNDAY: Sunday School 9 a.m.; Worship 10 a.m.; Evening 7 p.m. Wednesday: Teens 5 p.m.; Young Explorers 6:30 p.m. Augustana Lutheran Church, Clarkfield Sunday Worship 9:30, All Church Sunday School is the 2nd Sunday of the month. Bergen Lutheran Church, Granite Falls Sunday Worship 10:30, Sunday School during worship on the 2nd and last Sundays. Live Zoom service each Sunday at 10:30. Big Bend Lutheran, Milan Holy Communion 1st & 2nd Sundays of each month SUNDAY: Worship services begin at 10:30 am at Big Bend Lutheran Church

**Hope Reformed, Montevideo**

Sunday: Worship Service 9:30 a.m.; Gospel Adventures for K-7th grades during service. Service is available on Facebook.

Mondays: Prayer group 4:15 p.m. Wednesdays: Kidz Klub 4:30-6 p.m. grades K-4th; Family Meal 6-6:30 p.m.; Youth groups 6:45- 7:45 p.m. grades 5th-12th open to all in the community.

Fridays: Jumpstart 7:15-8 a.m. Grades 8th-12th. Volunteers serve flavored coffee and a warm breakfast open to all high school youth before school starts.
